case_title: JANET LIM VS. PUBLICIS TOUCHPOINT SOLUTIONS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-25-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JANET LIM. DEFENDANT PUBLICIS TOUCHPOINT SOLUTIONS, INC. DID NOT APPEAR. CONTINUED TO BE HEARED WITH RELATED CASE 858704. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-19-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JANET LIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PUBLICIS TOUCHPOINT SOLUTIONS, INC. REPRESENTED BY GREGORY LACEY IS PRESENT. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE, OR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE LAST HEARING. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
